name: Patient 4
history: Recent shoulder surgery with painful recovery. Ongoing pain from herniated cervical disc. Past history of physical therapy and prolonged illness.
intermediate_belief: My body is failing me and I'll never recover fully.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm permanently damaged and will always be in pain.
coping_strategies: Medical consultation, monitoring symptoms, seeking reassurance.
situation: Received an MRI report indicating a herniated disc. Contacted therapist after receiving report.
auto_thought: This proves my body is broken beyond repair.
behavior: Seek immediate medical feedback about MRI results.
